default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Boost My School and GrowthX to initiate SEO and content marketing engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Boost My School aims to grow from 200 to 1000 paying schools, positioning for next funding round](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [GrowthX demonstrated advanced competitive analysis and content strategy capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Focus on thought leadership content targeting development/advancement roles in K-12 schools](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Collaborative approach planned with GrowthX handling execution, Hudson providing strategic input](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Topics

### Company & Product Overview

  - [Boost My School helps K-12 schools with fundraising, currently at seed stage](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Primary ICP: private schools, with potential to expand to lower ACV public schools](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Key features: annual fund management, alumni relations, events/auctions](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

### Growth Goals & Metrics

  - [Grow from 200 to 1000 paying schools](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Focus on driving SQLs (sales qualified leads) through inbound website traffic](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Track conversion funnel: hand-raisers \> SALs (scheduled appointments) \> SQLs](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Aim for low-touch growth to demonstrate scalability for investors](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Target Audience & Buying Process

  - [Primary: Development/Advancement offices in K-12 schools](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Key roles: Director of Development, Annual Fund Managers, Alumni Relations Directors](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Decision-makers: Director of Development, Principal (smaller schools)](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Secondary audiences: volunteers, board members](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Leverage thought leadership approach that has worked well so far](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [Create content addressing specific jobs-to-be-done (e.g. live vs. silent auctions)](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Utilize webinar Q\&As and transcripts as content source material](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [Balance between high-volume "awareness" content and targeted mid-funnel pieces](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2175.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities Demo

  - [Showcased competitive analysis across 62,000+ keywords](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Demonstrated AI-powered content ideation and relevance scoring](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [Outlined multi-pronged approach: competitive gaps, persona-based, product-driven](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Transitioning from end-based blog to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2848.0)
  - [Need to optimize site structure, analytics setup](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hudson to send additional context: webinar transcripts, content examples, brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [GrowthX to ingest provided materials and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Create sample articles for review/calibration within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Schedule brief call to review content publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2871.0)
  - [Determine weekly check-in time](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2848.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin execution, aiming to publish first pieces within 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/46zrgdzeRqkt1AGTfZwy3hRsP9y5rzju?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)

action_items.description: Send typed notes on target audience/ICP questions to GrowthX team via Slack
Share recordings & transcripts from work with Fledge (product marketing) on ICP
Send transcripts of all webinars run in the last year to GrowthX team
Coordinate with GrowthX on 10-15 min session to demo publishing process on current/new blog platform
Follow up in Slack channel with technical questions on analytics tools, sitemaps, etc.
Send follow-up to coordinate weekly meeting time with Hudson via Slack
Send recording of kickoff meeting to Hudson
